attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT AS REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
-9999 SALES_ORDER_KEY,
-9999 SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NSAL.PRODUCT_KEY,
-9999 AR_TRX_KEY,
-9999 AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
-9999 BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
Coalesce(POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,Cast(-999 As Integer)) AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
-999 BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
-999 SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
-999 SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
NSAL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
CASE WHEN NSAL.SS_CODE ='QTC' THEN -9996 WHEN NSAL.SS_CODE='BV' THEN -9995 END DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY, 
(CASE WHEN NSAL.SS_CODE = 'UO' THEN
    -996
    WHEN NSAL.SS_CODE = 'BO' THEN
    -997
 END) GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 NSAL.RU_BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER AS SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 COALESCE(NSAL.RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ,Cast(-999 As Integer)) AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT AS BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
 NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT AS BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
 NSAL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 'UNKNO' DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
 NSAL.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME AS DD_GL_DATETIME,
 NULL DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
 -999 BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
 CAST(NSAL.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME AS DATE) AS DV_FISCAL_DT,
NULL DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
'UNKNOWN' DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD,
'POS ALLOCATION' DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
NULL DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
'UNKNOWN' BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
NSAL.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME AS AR_TRX_DATETIME,
'SLS_ADJ' REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
'UNKNOWN' DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
'Y' DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
'Y' DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
'N' DV_CHARGES_FLG,
'N' DV_MISC_FLG,
NSAL.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG AS DV_SERVICE_FLG,
'N' DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
'N' DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
'Y' DV_REVENUE_FLG,
NSAL.SELLING_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
NSAL.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT AS DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
NSAL.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
NSAL.COST_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
NSAL.SELLING_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
NSAL.SELLING_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
Cast(0.000000 As Decimal(18,6)) DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
NSAL.COST_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
Cast(0.000000 As Decimal(18,6)) AS DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
Cast(0.000000 As Decimal(18,6)) DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY,
Cast(0.000000 As Decimal(18,6)) DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME ,
/* ADDED THE BELOW COLUMNS AS PART OF  Q1FY15 OFFER ATTRIBUTION */
'STANDALONE' 								AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
NSAL.PRODUCT_KEY 					AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER) 						AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)  				    AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT		

FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE NSAL
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT NSA
ON (NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT = NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT AND 
NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_TYPE_CODE = 'POS'
AND NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE<>'POS-OA') AND /* ADDED THIS CONDITION AS PART OF  Q1FY15 OFFER ATTRIBUTION */
NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT > ( SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_ID 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS 
WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_WI_INV_REVENUE_MEASURE_POS' AND JOB_GROUP_ID = 'EDWTD_REV_MEASURE') 
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE POS_TRAN_LINE
ON (NSAL.RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT)

/*Removing the below code to restrict the POS-OA data from source as part of IDE retirement :OA-POS Dec FY15*/
/*
UNION ALL



SELECT 
NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT AS REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
-9999 SALES_ORDER_KEY,
-9999 SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NSAL.PRODUCT_KEY,
-9999 AR_TRX_KEY,
-9999 AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
-9999 BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
Coalesce(POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,Cast(-999 As Integer)) AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
-999 BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
-999 SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
-999 SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
NSAL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
-9996 AS DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY, 
-996 AS  GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 NSAL.RU_BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER AS SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 COALESCE(NSAL.RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ,Cast(-999 As Integer)) AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT AS BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
 NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT AS BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
 NSAL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 'UNKNO' DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
 NSAL.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME AS DD_GL_DATETIME,
 NULL DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
 -999 BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
 CAST(NSAL.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME AS DATE) AS DV_FISCAL_DT,
NULL DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
'UNKNOWN' DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD,
'POS ALLOCATION' DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
NULL DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
'UNKNOWN' BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
NSAL.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME AS AR_TRX_DATETIME,
'POS' REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
'UNKNOWN' DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
'Y' DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
'Y' DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
'N' DV_CHARGES_FLG,
'N' DV_MISC_FLG,
NSAL.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG AS DV_SERVICE_FLG,
'N' DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
'N' DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
'Y' DV_REVENUE_FLG,
NSAL.SELLING_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
NSAL.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT AS DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
NSAL.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
NSAL.COST_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
NSAL.SELLING_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
NSAL.SELLING_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
Cast(0.000000 As Decimal(18,6)) DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
NSAL.COST_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
Cast(0.000000 As Decimal(18,6)) AS DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
CAST(COALESCE(NSAL.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_2_TXT,0.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6))  	 AS DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY	,
CAST(COALESCE(NSAL.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_2_TXT,0.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6))  AS  DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME ,

 CASE    WHEN CUST.ATTRIBUTION_TOP_SKU_FLG='Y'  THEN 'OFFSET'
	 ELSE  'ATTRIBUTED'
	 END AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
	POS_TRAN_LINE.PRODUCT_KEY 					AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
	CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)			AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	CAST(COALESCE(CUST.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999) AS INTEGER) 	 AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
	
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE NSAL
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT NSA
ON (NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT = NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT AND 
NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_TYPE_CODE = 'POS'
AND NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE='POS-OA') AND 
NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT > ( SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_ID 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS 
WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_WI_INV_REVENUE_MEASURE_POS' AND JOB_GROUP_ID = 'EDWTD_REV_MEASURE') 
INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRX_LINE_OFFER_ATRBTN  CUST 
ON NSAL.RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT  =CUST.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND NSAL.PRODUCT_KEY=CUST.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE POS_TRAN_LINE
ON (NSAL.RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT)

*/
